decisions.name: Check_Retention_Queue_Present_Or_Not
decisions.label: Check Retention Queue Present Or Not

rules.name: Retention_Failed_By_RM_And_SM
rules.label: Retention Failed By RM And SM

decisions.name: Check_Retention_Status_Failed_Or_Success
decisions.label: Check Retention Status Failed Or Success

recordCreates.name: Create_Booking_Share_Record_For_User
recordCreates.label: Create Booking Share Record For User

recordLookups.name: Get_Notification_Record_Types_For_Group
recordLookups.label: Get Notification Record Types For Group

textTemplates.name: emailBodyForTaskQueue
textTemplates.text:
Hi Team,

A new task has been created and assigned to your queue. Below are the task details:


Task Subject: {!$Record.Subject}

Status: {!$Record.Status}

Due Date: {!$Record.ActivityDate}

Description: {!$Record.Description__c}

Customer: {!Get_Booking_Record_For_Queue.Opportunity__r.Name}

Booking: {!Get_Booking_Record_For_Queue.Name}

Project Unit: {!Get_Booking_Record_For_Queue.Unit_No__r.Name}

Task Link: https://runwal--fullcopy.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Task/{!$Record.Id}/view


Please review the task and take the necessary action at the earliest. Make sure to update the task status as progress is made.

Best Regards,

textTemplates.name: emailBodyForUser
textTemplates.text:
Hi Team,

A new task has been created and assigned to you. Below are the task details:


Task Subject: {!$Record.Subject}

Status: {!$Record.Status}

Due Date: {!$Record.ActivityDate}

Customer Name: {!Get_Booking_Record_For_Details.Opportunity__r.Name}

Booking: {!Get_Booking_Record_For_Details.Name}

Project Unit: {!Get_Booking_Record_For_Details.Unit_No__r.Name}

Task Link: https://runwal--fullcopy.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Task/{!$Record.Id}/view


Please review the task and take the necessary action at the earliest. Make sure to update the task status as progress is made.

Best Regards,

textTemplates.name: emailBodyRetentionFails
textTemplates.text:
Dear RM/SM,

This is to notify you that despite our best efforts, the retention process for {!Get_Booking_Record.Customer__r.Name} was unsuccessful.

The customer has decided to proceed with the cancellation/exit. Consequently, we are moving the file forward for the standard offboarding or refund process as per company policy.

Key Details:

  • Customer Name: {!Get_Booking_Record.Customer__r.Name}
  • Unit/Account No: {!Get_Booking_Record.Unit_No__r.Name}
  • Primary Reason for Exit: {!$Record.Remarks__c}

Please take the necessary steps to close the lead/account in the CRM and handle any further communication regarding the refund status.

textTemplates.name: notificationBodyForSuccesfulEmail
textTemplates.text:
Dear RM/SM,

We are pleased to inform you that the retention process for {!Get_Booking_Record.Customer__r.Name} has been successfully completed by the Retention Team.

The customer has agreed to continue their association with us, and the cancellation request has been officially withdrawn.

Key Details:

  • Customer Name: {!Get_Booking_Record.Customer__r.Name}
  • Unit/Account No: {!Get_Booking_Record.Unit_No__r.Name}
  • Retention Reason: {!$Record.Retention_Reason__c}
  • Current Status: Active

Please ensure that any pending documentation related to this retention is updated in the system. Feel free to reach out to the customer to reinforce the relationship.

textTemplates.name: taskSubjectForRetentionTeam
textTemplates.text: Retention Review: Retention Team Action Required
